meaning: 洛桑[瑞士西部城市,在日内瓦湖北岸]
examples: Lausanne, says Mr Schulz, therefore became irrelevant.
And we will also take a closer look at the Olympic Museum in the hilly city of Lausanne.
He says systems like those being developed in Lausanne and other places may be available in less than ten years.
The Big Band de Lausanne learned those parts and dressed up in red and black.
Just a few days before this concert, the WDR sent the Lausanne Big Band the parts.
